title: Program design
summary: 9618 A Level program design — structure charts, pseudocode refinement, and modular design.
learningObjectives: Draw structure charts for modular programs.
Identify modules, parameters, and return values.

simpleExplanation.title: Design before code
simpleExplanation.summary: Top-down design breaks problems into manageable modules with clear interfaces before implementation.
steps: Structure chart shows hierarchy and data flow.
Each module has one clear purpose.
Parameters pass data in; functions return results.
Refinement adds detail level by level.

sections.content: **Program design** (12.2) complements **12.1 algorithms**. Examiners award marks for **clear structure charts**.
